basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar) has released the official Assistant Professor Recruitment Notification 2026. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the AIIMS Bibinagar Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 50 years of age who possess an MBBS or equivalent qualification, along with DM/ M.Ch. or MD/ MS in the relevant specialty and the prescribed teaching experience, can apply offline on or before 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC-NCL: 3 years, PwBD/Govt Employees/Ex-servicemen: As per GoI rules

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent, DM/ M.Ch or MD/ MS (as per department), Teaching experience as specified
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Nephrology): MBBS or equivalent + DM (Nephrology) + 1 year teaching experience (for 2/5 year course) Assistant Professor (Neurology): MBBS or equivalent + DM (Neurology) + 1 year teaching experience (for 2/5 year course) Assistant Professor (ENT): MBBS or equivalent + MD/MS (ENT) + 3 years teaching experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsbibinagar.edu.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bibinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: MBBS or equivalent, DM/ M.Ch or MD/ MS (as per department), Teaching experience as specified

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bibinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Bibinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Nephrology): MBBS or equivalent + DM (Nephrology) + 1 year teaching experience (for 2/5 year course) Assistant Professor (Neurology): MBBS or equivalent + DM (Neurology) + 1 year teaching experience (for 2/5 year course) Assistant Professor (ENT): MBBS or equivalent + MD/MS (ENT) + 3 years teaching experience

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC-NCL: 3 years, PwBD/Govt Employees/Ex-servicemen: As per GoI rules

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsbibinagar.edu.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Bibinagar?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving offline applications for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Bibinagar is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,94,880/- per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications vary by department. Generally, it requires an MBBS or equivalent degree along with a DM/M.Ch or MD/MS in the relevant specialty, and specified teaching experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor posts is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC-NCL, PwBD, and ex-servicemen as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by document verification, and finally an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare for all stages.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Bibinagar Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bibinagar has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the post of Assistant Professor across different specializations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor positions are offered on a contractual basis. Candidates should be aware of the terms and conditions related to the contract period.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Bibinagar, which is https://aiimsbibinagar.edu.in/. The links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section.
